로마서 14:1.content: Now accept one who is weak in faith, but not for disputes over opinions.

로마서 14:2.content: One man has faith to eat all things, but he who is weak eats only vegetables.

로마서 14:3.content: Don’t let him who eats despise him who doesn’t eat. Don’t let him who doesn’t eat judge him who eats, for God has accepted him.

로마서 14:4.content: Who are you who judge another’s servant? To his own lord he stands or falls. Yes, he will be made to stand, for God has power to make him stand.

로마서 14:5.content: One man esteems one day as more important. Another esteems every day alike. Let each man be fully assured in his own mind.

로마서 14:6.content: He who observes the day, observes it to the Lord; and he who does not observe the day, to the Lord he does not observe it. He who eats, eats to the Lord, for he gives God thanks. He who doesn’t eat, to the Lord he doesn’t eat, and gives God thanks.

로마서 14:7.content: For none of us lives to himself, and none dies to himself.

로마서 14:8.content: For if we live, we live to the Lord. Or if we die, we die to the Lord. If therefore we live or die, we are the Lord’s.

로마서 14:9.content: For to this end Christ died, rose, and lived again, that he might be Lord of both the dead and the living.

로마서 14:10.content: But you, why do you judge your brother? Or you again, why do you despise your brother? For we will all stand before the judgment seat of Christ.

로마서 14:11.content: For it is written, “ ‘As I live,’ says the Lord, ‘to me every knee will bow. Every tongue will confess to God.’ ”

로마서 14:12.content: So then each one of us will give account of himself to God.

로마서 14:13.content: Therefore let’s not judge one another any more, but judge this rather, that no man put a stumbling block in his brother’s way, or an occasion for falling.

로마서 14:14.content: I know, and am persuaded in the Lord Jesus, that nothing is unclean of itself; except that to him who considers anything to be unclean, to him it is unclean.

로마서 14:15.content: Yet if because of food your brother is grieved, you walk no longer in love. Don’t destroy with your food him for whom Christ died.

로마서 14:16.content: Then don’t let your good be slandered,

로마서 14:17.content: for God’s Kingdom is not eating and drinking, but righteousness, peace, and joy in the Holy Spirit.

로마서 14:18.content: For he who serves Christ in these things is acceptable to God and approved by men.

로마서 14:19.content: So then, let’s follow after things which make for peace, and things by which we may build one another up.

로마서 14:20.content: Don’t overthrow God’s work for food’s sake. All things indeed are clean, however it is evil for that man who creates a stumbling block by eating.

로마서 14:21.content: It is good to not eat meat, drink wine, nor do anything by which your brother stumbles, is offended, or is made weak.

로마서 14:22.content: Do you have faith? Have it to yourself before God. Happy is he who doesn’t judge himself in that which he approves.

로마서 14:23.content: But he who doubts is condemned if he eats, because it isn’t of faith; and whatever is not of faith is sin.
